violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The cutting block in the kitchen is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan covers in the walk-in cooler and the ice machine in the freezer has an accumulation of dust/food residue. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The floors behind the of the refrigeration units and behind the dry foods storage area have an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
